summary: BPL's overall visit numbers climbed from FY22 through FY25 as the library system recovered from COVID-19 pandemic closures and resumed full in-person service. The FY26 figure is a preliminary, partial-year count; BPL's own reporting for the first four months of FY26 shows visit and program activity running at or above the prior year's pace, so the apparent FY26 decline likely reflects incomplete-year reporting rather than a real drop in attendance.

sources.label: NYC Public Libraries, Fiscal 2023 Mayor's Management Report
NYC Public Libraries, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
